message: Dataset split hashes must be staged for review-time reproducibility.
Model revision hashes must be staged for all teachers, students, and bases.
Adapter or checkpoint hashes must be staged, or the paper must not claim training reproducibility.
Generated trace corpora must be staged, or the paper must not claim raw trace reproducibility.
Run logs must be staged with stdout/stderr hashes, environment IDs, hardware metadata, and stage-in/out paths for review-time rerun support.
Raw trace inputs are required before adaptive laundering/base-mismatch runs are executable.
MTCR per-task profiles require concrete task-view trace inputs.
All scored matrices must be indexed and short-row review items resolved before final reproducibility.
Short scored-matrix rows must have an impact audit until the complete matrices are retrieved or rescored.
Missing scored trace IDs must be explicitly listed for reviewer-facing reproducibility repair.
Unresolved short scored matrices must have an exact real-row rescore manifest before any patch merge is allowed.
A hash manifest must exist for staged local artifacts.
Environment details must be staged; a stricter lock file can replace this contract row later.
